title: 菊花賞の後に・ウォークライ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! Biwa Hayahide has won the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ha! Haha... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Beyond a shadow of a doubt, I finally did it...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That was pretty fun, right, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What the heck is "fun" about losing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost this time, but I'm gonna win next
time, for sure! Raaaaah! Here I cooome!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Haha, where's she running off to now? She's
ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But... I get it. I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I sure did!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait, was that Hayahide yelling just now?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Taishin! Nice race today! Thanks for always
bringing out the best in me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You've got to be joking. Are you really
Hayahide? Did you and Ticket switch bodies or
something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No! It's really me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Is it seriously her?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Sorry about that. I guess the adrenaline
hasn't worn off yet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's whatever. I've already forgotten all about it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, have you decided on your next race yet?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good question. Well, since we finished all the
Classic Triple Crown races, the next one available
after winter is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. It's a prestigious race in Kyoto, and I
really want to compete with elite racers there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to win it if I want to be called the best of
my generation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good luck with that. I'll be there too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I plan on winning, just so you know. Later.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose that makes sense. I know I only
just caught up to Taishin and Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I plan on winning it too. I'll win every race I
must to reach the very top!
choice_data_list: That's what I like to hear!
That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an utter relief seeing how much brighter her
smile is than before.
